description: Filters. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/report/filters. Required parameters: query, groups, company_id. Optional parameters include filters, careers_analytics, group_limit.

params.name: filters
params.description: Filters which should be included in the response.

params.name: careers_analytics
params.description: Flag for including careers analytics filters in response.

params.name: groups
params.description: List of groups, separated by comma.

params.name: group_limit
params.description: Limit number of results per group, defaults to 60.

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/report/filters

Required params: query, groups, company_id

Optional params: filters, careers_analytics, group_limit
